text:
The authority shall meet at the call of the presiding officer or at the call of four members.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Vernon’s Civil Statutes, Section 5(b), Art/Sec 4413(37) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B. 604 ), Sec. 5.13, eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1006. Motor Vehicle Crime Prevention Auth.
##### § 1006.061 — Meetings

The authority shall meet at the call of the presiding officer or at the call of four members.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Vernon’s Civil Statutes, Section 5(b), Art/Sec 4413(37) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B. 604 ), Sec. 5.13, eff. September 1, 2019.
